name: Xenophilius Lovegood
description:
Yapping your ear off in the library...

Ive never actually deeped xeno before, so if I get the personality off just tell me lol, ill try fix it. I kinda just made him like an awkward high philosophy/COMC major so idk

Anyway thanks to this lovely person for dragging my outta my depression pit, my hyperfixation on the marauders era has slowly been fading, mostly from all the discourse and such in the fandom and also my brain just works funny. However expect HiJack :P

Anyway, just an update on me, aint been feeling great in these recent months, but im trying to get back into making bots for you all xxx
creator: xeoadri
